subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is wronged in all horizons unto one of the handmaidens of God, that she may hearken unto the Word of Truth and unto that which today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از مظلوم آفاق بیکی از اماء الهی تا کلمه حق را بشنود و بآنچه الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment
